query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mirror_tokens (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  house_id INT NOT NULL,
  holder_id INT NOT NULL,
  amount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  locked_until DATETIME NOT NULL,
  is_locked BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  transferred_from INT,
  INDEX idx_house (house_id),
  INDEX idx_holder (holder_id)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mirror_tokens (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  house_id INT NOT NULL,
  holder_id INT NOT NULL,
  amount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  locked_until DATETIME NOT NULL,
  is_locked BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  transferred_from INT,
  INDEX idx_house (house_id),
  INDEX idx_holder (holder_id)
);
